title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Tata CLiQ

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Tata CLiQ
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Tata CLiQ. We are on the lookout for a dedicated SEO Specialist to strengthen our Noida-based team.

About Tata CLiQ:
Tata CLiQ is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata CLiQ!
